title: Planning Registration Baseline (planning-registration-baseline v1.0)
description: Controlled tolerance artefact for known planning drift. The baseline records findings that CI is permitted to tolerate. It does not prove that the planning is correct; it prevents known drift and new drift from being mixed. Only UNREGISTERED_PLANNING_ARTIFACT findings are eligible for the baseline; INVALID_PLANNING_EXCEPTION findings are never written here.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of baseline generation.

entries.description: Known, currently tolerated planning-drift findings, sorted by (path, code, id).
